I was crying hard asf rn so this mf better be good 😭 (Ngl, I just wanted an excuse to use this song and make Luffy again.... soooo)

_________________________________________

It’s been years since you last saw the three brothers, and the last time you saw them was when each of them left. Then, you happened to receive news about Ace’s death, and, of course, you were distraught. Now, you’ve moved to Dressrosa when you hear a familiar laugh...
